debug_mode.description: Enable verbose server-side debug logging of prompts / usage for the consultant bot (never shown to the guest). Disable in production.

llm_connection_slug.description: Slug of the CORE LLM Connection (S97) the consultant uses. Empty selects the active default connection. The plugin stores NO API key — the model/endpoint/key live in the core LLM connection registry.

persona.default: You are a friendly, concise sales consultant for our platform. Recommend only from the provided catalog and never invent a price.
persona.description: Persona text steering the consultant + sales-agent voice.

reward_enabled.description: When on, the consultant offers a referral discount (S92) on a buy intent so a redeemed sale credits the bot's token balance.

retrieval_mode.description: Corpus retrieval backend. 'fts' = Postgres full-text search baseline (no external vector DB).

rag_dir.description: Directory of the static sales corpus (.md and .pdf). ${VBWD_VAR_DIR} is resolved at runtime.
